phases.name: Transport
phases.focus: Offline Wi-Fi domains, captive portal redirection, reticulum-style daemon, LoRa/BLE/Kademlia pathfinding.
deliverables: Captive portal serves offline PWA (nginx body size ≥ 150M)
Identity-based routing without public DNS for island traffic
Smartphone test packet → translator → LoRa MAC framing
Kademlia pathfinding to offline node (sim acceptable)

definition_of_done.pass: Test packet translates and routes via Kademlia to second offline peer (hw or sim).
Device joining Wi-Fi island gets portal UI without upstream Internet.
No required cloud DB or public DNS for island routing.
integration init path runs without panic (stub OK).

phases.name: Sandbox
phases.focus: WAMR/WASI environment, fixed-block pools, MinRoot VDF-gated ephemeral Job DIDs.
deliverables: WAMR (or faithful stub) with bounded linear memory
Symmetric static INT8 policy hooks
Ephemeral Job DID gated by ~10-minute sequential VDF
allocate hard-fails past MEM_LIMIT with deterministic error

definition_of_done.pass: Guest heap ≤ 10 MB; over-alloc → Err, not UB.
Job DID requires successful MinRoot VDF verify.
OOM and missing-export codes stable across nodes.
Sandbox + VDF unit tests green; integration execute path returns stub bytes.

phases.name: Consensus
phases.focus: trie-db ledger, nova-snark folding, yrs/CRDT island merge.
deliverables: Incremental Merkle-Patricia (or equivalent) active ledger
Constant-size (or bounded sub-MB) edge verification proof
Deterministic merge of divergent islands
Active ledger size accounting vs SLA-RAM

definition_of_done.pass: Peer verifies update via sub-megabyte constant/bounded proof.
Two partitions converge to identical root after merge.
Active ledger ≤ 10 MB under documented workload.
insert → prove → verify round-trip in tests.

phases.name: Logic
phases.focus: Compile shakmaty to wasm32-wasip1, mesh messaging, HTLC escrow with VDF-delayed cancellation.
deliverables: Engine compiles to wasm32-wasip1 and loads in sandbox
Deterministic legal moves + evaluation
Mnps harness (~836 target on reference profile)
HTLC + VDF-delayed cancellation
Mesh messaging for job distribute / result collect

definition_of_done.pass: Same FEN corpus → identical outputs on two hosts in sandbox.
Benchmark ~836 Mnps on agreed profile (or justified gap).
Escrow open → work → claim/refund tested; VDF cancel enforced.
Sampled re-exec mismatch < 1% on chess job corpus.

phases.name: Interop
phases.focus: UI layout serving, AsyncAPI/OpenAPI endpoints, TWAMM orchestration on internet reconnect.
deliverables: Stable AsyncAPI/OpenAPI submit/sync/health
Uplink gateway without abandoning island autonomy
TWAMM bridge with ≤ 2% max-spread
Frontend wired to host API for chess + network status

definition_of_done.pass: With uplink, gateway serves; without, island APIs still work.
Simulated trade path enforces max-spread ≤ 2%.
Captive-portal chess works offline E2E against local host.
SLA-RAM/DET/TO checks automated in CI smoke (even if simulated).
